import time
import numpy as np

def task_func(samples=10, delay=0.1):
    # Initialize lists to store timestamps and delays
    timestamps = []
    delays = []

    # Generate initial timestamp
    start_time = time.time()
    timestamps.append(start_time)

    for _ in range(1, samples):
        current_time = time.time()
        delay_time = current_time - timestamps[-1]
        delays.append(delay_time)
        timestamps.append(current_time)
        time.sleep(delay)

    # Calculate mean and standard deviation of the delay times
    mean_delay = np.mean(delays)
    stddev_delay = np.std(delays)

    return tuple([mean_delay, stddev_delay])
